name: Kibun Foods Inc.
summary: Kibun Foods Inc. engages in the production and marketing of processed foods under the Kibun brand name in Japan and internationally. It offers fish paste-based products and crab-flavored seafood, as well as Chinese, side, and summertime dishes. The company markets its products through distributors, as well as its online store. Kibun Foods Inc. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
